heroText: A boutique resort in Koh Tao where nature, comfort and timeless hospitality meet.
storyHeading: Rooted in Nature, Made for Rest
storyText: Jungle House Koh Tao is a boutique retreat tucked into the lush hills of Koh Tao. Our curved pool, hidden paths and tranquil spaces invite you to slow down, breathe deep and reconnect with nature and yourself.
